Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Ragnarus Gate]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Crimson Vault ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 16''' — A Ragnarus Gate leads straight into the middle of the royal palace in Cana.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 21''' — There is a Gate to Ragnarus.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 23''' — Alin steps off a blue pedestal away from the Ragnarus Gate.}}

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 2''' — The Ragnarus Gate hung open behind Zakareth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 11''' — The Ragnarus Gate is a location.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 17''' — A Ragnarus Gate is a type of gate.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 17''' — An ordinary red-bordered Gate to Ragnarus opened leading out into the royal palace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 20''' — King Zakareth stands next to a huge Ragnarus Gate.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
